subcodes.first_line: Consider thou the grace and bestowal of God, and reflect upon the loving-kindness and favour of His exalted Presence, which is healing for every pain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در فضل و موهبت الهيّه نظر نما و به لطف و عنايت حضرت کبريا تفکّر کن که درمان هر درد است
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @courtesy; culture [adab], @service to others; to the Cause of God
